mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.project_id AS "projectId", d.id AS "detailId", d.version, d.attachments, d.solution_explanation AS "solutionExplanation", d.annotation, d.defrost_explanation AS "defrostExplanation", d.apply_defrost_at AS "applyDefrostAt", d.signature_url AS "signatureUrl", d.signed_at AS "signedAt", a.status, a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.updated_by AS "updatedBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt", p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", creator.name AS "createdByName", updater.name AS "updatedByName", CASE a.status WHEN 1 THEN '待提交' WHEN 2 THEN '待确认' WHEN 3 THEN '已确认' WHEN 4 THEN '已冻结' WHEN 5 THEN '解冻中' WHEN 6 THEN '已完成' ELSE '' END AS "statusText" FROM solution_design a LEFT JOIN solution_design_detail d ON d.solution_design_id = a.id AND d.version = (SELECT MAX(sd.version) FROM solution_design_detail sd WHERE sd.solution_design_id = a.id) LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account updater ON updater.id = a.updated_by WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT d.id, d.solution_design_id AS "solutionDesignId", d.version, d.attachments, d.solution_explanation AS "solutionExplanation", d.annotation, d.defrost_explanation AS "defrostExplanation", d.apply_defrost_at AS "applyDefrostAt", d.signature_url AS "signatureUrl", d.signed_at AS "signedAt", d.created_by AS "createdBy", d.updated_by AS "updatedBy", d.created_at AS "createdAt", d.updated_at AS "updatedAt", creator.name AS "createdByName", updater.name AS "updatedByName" FROM solution_design_detail d LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = d.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account updater ON updater.id = d.updated_by WHERE d.solution_design_id = #{solutionDesignId} ORDER BY d.version DESC, d.id DESC

SELECT id, solution_design_id AS "solutionDesignId", version, attachments, solution_explanation AS "solutionExplanation", annotation, defrost_explanation AS "defrostExplanation", apply_defrost_at AS "applyDefrostAt", signature_url AS "signatureUrl", signed_at AS "signedAt", created_by AS "createdBy", updated_by AS "updatedBy", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM solution_design_detail WHERE id = ( SELECT MAX(sdd.id) FROM solution_design_detail sdd WHERE sdd.solution_design_id = #{solutionDesignId} AND sdd.version = ( SELECT MAX(sddv.version) FROM solution_design_detail sddv WHERE sddv.solution_design_id = #{solutionDesignId} ) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO solution_design_detail ( solution_design_id, version, attachments, solution_explanation, annotation, defrost_explanation, apply_defrost_at, signature_url, signed_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{solutionDesignId}, #{version}, #{attachments}, #{solutionExplanation}, #{annotation}, #{defrostExplanation}, #{applyDefrostAt}, #{signatureUrl}, #{signedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE solution_design_detail SET version = #{version}, attachments = #{attachments}, solution_explanation = #{solutionExplanation}, annotation = #{annotation}, defrost_explanation = #{defrostExplanation}, apply_defrost_at = #{applyDefrostAt}, signature_url = #{signatureUrl}, signed_at = #{signedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
